creator: milki@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to kheuer from comment #3)
> The echo was just for testing and can be removed. I added -w to CFLAGS to
> suppress apparently harmless warnings. Sorry for PLIST_FILES, this can also
> be removed. I didn't take care of pkg-plist file.
> 
> I habe no www, sorry; license of the source code is a BSD kind of license.
> Does this help?

Yes, thanks. Don't worry about possible mistakes. I'm here to help.

This looks like a BDS-4 license. I'll remove the echo, add LICENSE for BSD4, and fix the plist.
